suppress.notes:
False Positive: CVE-2015-0897 affects LINE messaging application, NOT pitest.
OWASP Dependency Check incorrectly matches pitest-command-line-1.17.4.jar due to CPE mismatch (cpe:2.3:a:line:line:1.17.4:*:*:*:*:*:*:*).
Pitest is a build-time mutation testing tool with no runtime security exposure. CVE relates to MITM vulnerability in LINE mobile app (unrelated product).
Justification: False positive due to CPE naming collision Reviewed: 2025-11-03 Approver: Wall-E (Story 1.9) Next Review: 2026-02-03 (quarterly)
